message:
refactor(replay): migrate async tests from #[tokio::test] to CompatRuntime helper

Convert all replay module async tests to use run_async_test() with
CompatRuntime via runtime_compat::RuntimeBuilder, decoupling from the
tokio::test macro. Test logic unchanged — only the runtime harness
is swapped for the project's own abstraction layer.

Affected tests: play_simple_all_frames, play_with_stop_control,
play_double_speed, play_with_events_and_markers,
play_empty_recording_finishes_immediately, play_with_pause_then_resume,
play_simple_records_correct_final_position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
